if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND i.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND i.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmCouponItem :: selectById */ i.* , cpn.coupon_nm AS coupon_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cit.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon_item i LEFT JOIN pm_coupon cpn ON cpn.coupon_id = i.coupon_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cit ON cd_cit.code_grp = 'COUPON_ITEM_TARGET' AND cd_cit.code_value = i.target_type_cd WHERE i.coupon_item_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmCouponItem :: selectList */ i.* , cpn.coupon_nm AS coupon_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cit.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon_item i LEFT JOIN pm_coupon cpn ON cpn.coupon_id = i.coupon_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cit ON cd_cit.code_grp = 'COUPON_ITEM_TARGET' AND cd_cit.code_value = i.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmCouponItem :: selectPageList */ i.* , cpn.coupon_nm AS coupon_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cit.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon_item i LEFT JOIN pm_coupon cpn ON cpn.coupon_id = i.coupon_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cit ON cd_cit.code_grp = 'COUPON_ITEM_TARGET' AND cd_cit.code_value = i.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(i.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmCouponItem :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_coupon_item i
